things.name: Upper Town (Gornji Grad)
things.description: Zagreb's medieval hilltop old town with St Mark's Church, Lotrscak Tower and funicular ride

things.name: Museum of Broken Relationships
things.description: Quirky award-winning museum of personal objects donated after failed relationships — uniquely moving

things.name: Dolac Market
things.description: Zagreb's vibrant open-air farmers market operating since 1930 — fresh produce, flowers and local food

things.name: Zagreb Cathedral
things.description: Croatia's tallest building (108m) — Gothic cathedral with the tomb of Cardinal Stepinac

things.name: Mirogoj Cemetery
things.description: One of Europe's most beautiful cemeteries — monumental arcaded cemetery park from 1876

things.name: Ban Jelacic Square
things.description: Zagreb's main square with the equestrian statue of Ban Jelacic — the city's social hub

things.name: Tkalciceva Street
things.description: Pedestrianised bar and cafe street in the old town — Zagreb's liveliest street for terrace drinking

things.name: Art Pavilion
things.description: Beautiful yellow Art Nouveau exhibition pavilion (1898) in King Tomislav Square

things.name: Plitvice Lakes National Park
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage cascading turquoise lakes and waterfalls in the Croatian mountains — 140 km away

things.name: Zagreb Craft Beer Scene
things.description: Croatia's thriving craft beer culture — visit taprooms in the Lower Town and the Craft Beer Festival
